hero.title: Soog-n-taar la bĩngr modɛl
hero.lead: IATF kɩtdame tɩ b tʋʋm-noy nins sẽn tɩ loe ne b sẽn tõe n paamã yɩ zãma wã rẽnda, tɩ b tõe n karem-ba, la b tõog n zã-ba.
support: Seb-kãngã wilgda bũmb ning sẽn zemsã, b sẽn zãad b sɛbã to-to wã, la b sẽn na n maan bũmb ning sɛbã reegr poore.

cards.title: Tʋʋmd sẽn zemse
paragraphs: IATF sak n deegda tʋʋm nins sẽn zabd ne bũmb sẽn tõe n gɩdg nebã tɩ b pa tõe n paam n kẽ wã, la sẽn tar yõod zãma wã nifẽ vẽenega.
Tʋʋm-noor segd n yɩɩ sõma n yɩɩd tʋʋm-no-rɩk a yembr sẽn yaa soog-m-meng t'a tõe n yɩ zãma wã bĩngr zĩig me.

Sẽn kẽed ne ẽtɛgnetã sẽn tõe n paamã wɛɛngẽ, IATF tũnugda ne [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) Sẽn yɩɩd fãa, yaa sẽn na yɩl tɩ b tõog n bãng b sẽn tõe n maan to-to n sõng b kambã tɩ b wʋm Biiblã goam võor sõma n paase.

cards.title: Tʋʋmdã sakre
paragraphs: B tõe n deega no-tũudg sã n mikame tɩ:
items: yaa sẽn na n sõng tɩ b tõog n paam b sẽn datã
Yel-kãngã yaa vẽenega, tɩ d tõe n vaees-a
yaa sɩd tɩ b na n sɩngame
tʋʋmda zemsa ne IATF tʋʋmda
yaa bũmb sẽn tõe n kɩt tɩ b tõog n maan yel-gɛtg bɩ n baas-a

cards.title: Seb-vãoogã soog-m-mengã
paragraphs: Tʋʋm nins b sẽn sak n deegã b sẽn naanã bee IATF GitHub siglgẽ wã.
Yaa be la b bĩngd sɛba, sẽn na yɩl tɩ tʋʋm-noy fãa kell n tall zĩig sẽn yaa kãn-kãe zãma wã yĩnga, baa sã n mikame tɩ b na n toeema b sẽn zãad b sɛbã to-to wã.

cards.title: Sã n yaa ne lisensã
paragraphs: IATF tʋʋm-noyã tũuda ne copyleft tɩ sã n pa tʋʋmnoy sẽn wilgd a to:
items: Koodã: AGPL-3.0
Sɛb nins sẽn yetã: CC BY-SA 4.0

maintainer.title: Masĩn-soab bɩ yel-gɛt ning sẽn get tʋʋmdã yelle
paragraphs: Tʋʋmd ning fãa b sẽn na n sak n deegã segd n paama insenɛɛr bɩ ned a to sẽn yaa yel-gɛt t'a tõe n paam sor n tõe n zã bĩngrã, la b segd n maana woto:
items: seb-vãoog b sẽn na n maan zãma wã pʋgẽ
n kell n tall b sɛbã b sẽn da bĩngã.
vaeesg bɩ yel-kãsemsã zãabo, la bool kosgo
Gʋls-y bũmb nins b sẽn yãk yam n na n maanã
sõng-y neb a taabã tɩ b wʋm y sẽn maandã võore
maintainer.footnote: Yaa sullã taoor soab n segd n ges yel-kãnga yelle. Yaa sull ning sẽn get tʋʋm-noyã yelle.

publicDevelopment.title: Zãma wã yidgr
paragraphs: Tʋʋm nins b sẽn sɩng ne IATF wã yaa zãma wã rẽnda.
items: Sebr ning b sẽn gʋlsã
yel-kãsems
Sɛb nins b sẽn gʋlsã
Sebr ning sẽn wilgd b sẽn na n maan to-to wã
B sẽn yiisd-a to-to
publicDevelopment.footnote: Tʋʋmdã bãngr sẽn tar yõodã pa segd n zĩnd ned ne a to sõsg babgẽ wall b sẽn gʋlsd-b bũmb ningã pʋgẽ bal ye.

header.title: Sebr b sẽn gʋls n wilg nebã b sẽn dat n maan bũmb ningã

paragraphs: IATF tʋʋmda zãma wã pʋgẽ sẽn nan yɩll tɩ b tõog n maan b sẽn datã.

Sebr ning b sẽn boond tɩ "public request record" wã pa segd n yɩ pipi koɛɛg ye. IATF tõe n tigma, n lebs n gʋls bɩ n toeeme, sẽn nan yɩll tɩ b tõog n ges b sẽn dat n maan bũmb ningã, n pa wilg ned ning sẽn dat tɩ b maan-a bũmb ningã ye.
B tõe n bĩng-a-la IATF GitHub siglgẽ wã, ẽtɛrnet kãnga zugu, bɩ a yiibã fãa.

Nand tɩ b yiis seb-kãngã, IATF yiisda kibay nins sẽn pa tɩlae sẽn na yɩl tɩ b tõe n paam n sõs ne nedã, la b yiisd kibay sẽn na n sõng ned t'a bãng a sẽn segd n maan to-to, sã n pa yaa vẽeneg tɩ b rat n yiis-a lame, la tɩ rẽ zemsame.
Yaa sẽn nan yɩll tɩ b tõog n maan b sẽn tõe fãa sẽn kẽed ne tʋʋm-noy nins b sẽn tʋmdã wɛɛngẽ.
B sẽn boond tɩ "public" wã rat n yeelame tɩ b tõe n vaeesame n bãng b sẽn maand bũmb ningã, la pa rat n yeel tɩ b sẽn tõe n yã-a ne yʋy baoob ye.
IATF tõe n paasame bɩ n yiis kibayã sẽn be b zãma wã pʋgẽ wã, la b pa tõe n kɩs sɩd tɩ b na n yiis-b-la zĩis a taab ye.
Y sã n dat tɩ koɛɛg kell n yɩ yɩlemde, bɩ y ra tʋm-a ne IATF zãma wã soay ye.

header.kicker: Tʋʋmd ning b sẽn maand siglgã pʋgẽ
header.title: Kãsem-soaba

chair.lead: Tʋʋmdã taoor soab geta IATF siglg fãa yelle, la rẽ yaa toor ne tʋʋm-no-kẽndr taoor soab sẽn get tʋʋmdã yelle: a geta siglgã zãng yelle, n pa get bũmb ning fãa b sẽn maand daar fãa wã yell ye.

duties.title: Bõn-naandgã sẽn maand to-to
items: A gãda soog-n-meng sor-wilgr IATF GitHub sullã zugu
B gʋlsa sɛb sẽn wilgd tɩ b sak n deegame tɩ b na n maana b tʋʋma, la b sẽn yãk yam n na n bĩng sɛbã
A yaa IATF zãma wã taoor soaba.
A sigla yʋʋm-vẽkrã
duties.footnote: Tʋʋmdã taoor soab pa kõt IATF sor t'a tʋm tʋʋm-noy sẽn kẽed ne neb a taab pʋɩɩr wɛɛngẽ, tʋʋma yaoodgo, bɩ tʋʋma pʋɩɩrã wɛɛngẽ, la a pa na n tõog tɩ b yãk b sẽn na n maan bũmb ning b sẽn segd n maan n zã b sɛbã bĩngr wɛɛngẽ wã ye.

election.title: Yʋʋmd fãa, b yãka ned t'a na n zĩnd be.
paragraphs: B yãkda sullã taoor soab yʋʋmdã pʋgẽ, tʋʋl-nif kiuug pipi semen a yiib-n-soabã pʋgẽ, la b sã n wa yãk-a, b na n wilg-a-la yʋʋm-sar kiuug rasem 15 daare, t'a na n sɩnga yʋʋm-vẽkr kiuug pipi daarã.

Neb nins sẽn tõe n votã yaa neb nins sẽn da tʋmd IATF bĩngr zĩig pʋgẽ yʋʋmdã pʋgẽ wã, la sẽn maan bũmb a ye sẽn naag taab n sõng tɩ b tõog n deeg bĩngo. Ned fãa tara vot a ye. Ned ning sẽn paam-a vot n yɩɩdã n na n tõoge; sã n mik tɩ b votã pa zemse, b na n maana vot a yiib-n-soabã sigr kiuug rasem a tãab soabã.
Rɩk-n-migsã yaa zãma wã GitHub sõsg sẽn be IATF goosneerã b sẽn yãk zĩigã pʋgẽ, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ nin-sabls sullã, votã, la sẽn wa ne-a wã fãa yɩ zãma taoor sebre.

continuity.title: Kẽngr-n-taaga
paragraphs: Sã n pa yãkr n zĩndi, taoor soab ning sẽn yaa taoor soabã ket n yaa taoor soab hal tɩ ta yãkr ning sẽn pʋgdã.
A taoor soabã tõe n basa a tʋʋmdã wakat ning fãa a sẽn datã.

current.title: Tʋʋmd ning b sẽn maand rũndã-rũndã

fields.label: Gom-bilã
fields.value: Sẽn ta yʋʋm 2026 yʋʋm-sar kiuugã na-kẽndre

fields.label: Tʋʋmd ning b sẽn da tʋmdẽ wã

chair.footnote: Sẽn nan yɩll tɩ siglgã taoor lʋɩtbã tõog n ges b tʋʋmdã yell sõma wã, b lugla sull ning sẽn get siglgã yell yʋʋmd 2026.

states.title: Tʋʋmdã sẽn yaa to-to
paragraphs: Tʋʋmdã tũuda ne goosneerã sẽn yetã:
items: B sẽn na n maan to-to
B sakame
Tʋʋmd sẽn maandã
Yɛl sẽn pa vigsd ye
B baooda ned sẽn na n ges b yell sõma
B sẽn bĩngã
states.footnote: Tẽns kãensã kɩtdame tɩ ned tõe n ges b sɛbã nana-nana.

reassignment.title: B leb n kõ-a-la zĩig a to la b bĩng-a sɛbẽ
paragraphs: Sã n yaa ned n na n bas tʋʋmda, IATF tõe n lebs n pʋɩ-a-la tʋʋmde, n gɩdg tʋʋma, bɩ n bĩng tʋʋmda.
B leb n tõe n basa tʋʋmde, b sã n wa tõog n pids raab ning b sẽn da tar sɩngrẽ wã, tɩ b pa le tõe n kell n maan tʋʋm-kãng ye.
reassignment.footnote: Tʋʋm nins b sẽn bĩng sɛbã pʋsẽ wã ket n yaa neba fãa n tõe n yã, sã n pa be bʋʋm sẽn tar pãng sẽn kɩt tɩ b maan a to.

header.kicker: Bãngr-gomd sẽn wilgd b sẽn segd n maan to-to
header.title: Bõe la IATF pa kõt bas-m-yam ye

items: neb nins b sẽn dɩkd n kõt neb a taabã
Sõng-y-yã-b tɩ b bãng b sẽn segd n maan to-to
B sak n deegda b sẽn dat n maan bũmb ningã fãa
Sẽn na n yɩlẽ n tõog n maan bũmba fãa tɩ yɩ sõma, b segd n maana b sẽn tõe fãa.
boundaries.footnote: IATF yaa zãma wã bĩngr makre, la pa soog-m-meng pʋɩɩr tʋʋmde.
